reasoning: Lactate clearance is the primary limiter, indicated by the 25W drop-off from your 5-minute to 20-minute power. In your last ride, your average power was 167.5W over 117 minutes, showing room to push higher intensities. This session will mimic key sections of the Alpine Loop, focusing on over-unders to boost your ability to sustain higher averages in climbing scenarios.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 10 minutes over-unders: 2 minutes at 242-256W, 3 minutes at 201-218W, repeat, with 5-minute easy spin recovery between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
